creator: marco.broeder@posteo.eu
text:
> Just to explain something, the use of
> update-etc-shells:
> 
> That's in the handbook, is no longer used. Just as your option,
> '.include <bsd.port.options.mk>'

'bsd.port.options.mk' was newly introduced not long ago.

It is the -new- way of options handling.

See ../porters-handbook/makefile-options.html
under '5.11.2.2 Syntax' and 'Example 5-8'. ;-)

-- 
Regards,
Marco Bröder <marco.broeder@gmx.eu>
